---
title: "EEG Microstate Overview"
output: html_document
params:
  input_dir: "artifacts/manual/eeg_microstate_overview"
  runtime_hash: "97411c0ec4"
  output_dir: "artifacts/manual/eeg_microstate_overview"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
source("_common.R")

resolve_repo_path <- function(path, must_exist = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(path) || !nzchar(path)) {
    stop("A non-empty path parameter is required.")
  }
  is_absolute <- grepl("^[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\]|^/", path)
  candidates <- if (is_absolute) c(path) else c(path, file.path("..", path))
  if (must_exist) {
    for (candidate in candidates) {
      if (file.exists(candidate)) {
        return(normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
      }
    }
    stop(paste("Could not resolve path:", path))
  }
  candidate <- candidates[[length(candidates)]]
  normalizePath(candidate, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
}

for (pkg in c("svglite", "ggdist", "ggtext", "paletteer", "patchwork")) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop(paste0("Missing required package '", pkg, "'. Install it with: install.packages('", pkg, "')"))
  }
}

library(ggdist)
library(ggtext)
library(paletteer)
library(patchwork)

input_dir <- resolve_repo_path(params$input_dir, must_exist = TRUE)
output_dir <- ensure_output_dir(resolve_repo_path(params$output_dir, must_exist = FALSE))
runtime_hash <- params$runtime_hash
output_stem <- paste0("eeg_microstate_", runtime_hash)

required_paths <- list(
  template_values = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_template_values.csv")),
  topomap_grid = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_topomap_grid.csv")),
  subject_parameters = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_subject_parameters_anonymized.csv")),
  parameter_long = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_parameter_long.csv")),
  group_parameters = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_group_parameters.csv")),
  transition_matrix = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_transition_matrix.csv")),
  waveform_segment = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_waveform_segment_long.csv")),
  waveform_gfp = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_waveform_gfp_peaks.csv")),
  waveform_info = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_waveform_segment_info.csv")),
  python_topographies = file.path(input_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_cluster_topographies.svg"))
)

missing_paths <- names(required_paths)[!file.exists(unlist(required_paths))]
if (length(missing_paths) > 0) {
  stop(paste(
    "Missing Python export artifacts:",
    paste(missing_paths, collapse = ", "),
    "Run scripts/export_eeg_microstate_overview.py first."
  ))
}

template_values <- read.csv(required_paths$template_values, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
topomap_grid <- read.csv(required_paths$topomap_grid, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
subject_parameters <- read.csv(required_paths$subject_parameters, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
parameter_long <- read.csv(required_paths$parameter_long, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
group_parameters <- read.csv(required_paths$group_parameters, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
transition_matrix <- read.csv(required_paths$transition_matrix, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
waveform_segment <- read.csv(required_paths$waveform_segment, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
waveform_gfp <- read.csv(required_paths$waveform_gfp, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
waveform_info <- read.csv(required_paths$waveform_info, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

microstate_levels <- paste("Microstate", sort(unique(template_values$microstate)))

template_values <- template_values %>%
  mutate(microstate_label = factor(microstate_label, levels = microstate_levels))

topomap_grid <- topomap_grid %>%
  mutate(
    microstate_label = factor(microstate_label, levels = microstate_levels),
    inside_head = as.logical(inside_head)
  )

subject_parameters <- subject_parameters %>%
  mutate(microstate_label = factor(microstate_label, levels = microstate_levels))

parameter_long <- parameter_long %>%
  mutate(
    microstate_label = factor(microstate_label, levels = microstate_levels),
    metric_label = factor(
      metric_label,
      levels = c("Coverage (%)", "Mean duration (ms)", "Occurrence (events/s)", "GEV (%)", "Mean template correlation")
    )
  )

transition_matrix <- transition_matrix %>%
  mutate(
    from_label = factor(from_label, levels = rev(microstate_levels)),
    to_label = factor(to_label, levels = microstate_levels),
    transition_pct = mean_transition_probability * 100,
    transition_label = sprintf("%.1f%%", transition_pct)
  )

channel_levels <- waveform_segment %>%
  distinct(channel, channel_order) %>%
  arrange(channel_order) %>%
  pull(channel)

waveform_segment <- waveform_segment %>%
  mutate(
    channel = factor(channel, levels = channel_levels),
    channel_group = factor(channel_group, levels = c("Frontal", "Temporal", "Central", "Parietal", "Occipital", "Other"))
  )

waveform_gfp <- waveform_gfp %>%
  mutate(is_peak = as.logical(is_peak))

waveform_channels <- waveform_segment %>%
  distinct(channel, channel_group, channel_y, channel_order) %>%
  arrange(channel_order)

waveform_peaks <- waveform_gfp %>% filter(is_peak)

waveform_info_value <- function(key) {
  value <- waveform_info$value[waveform_info$key == key]
  if (length(value) == 0) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  value[[1]]
}

microstate_palette <- as.character(paletteer::paletteer_d("ggthemes::Tableau_10"))[c(1, 2, 3, 4)]
names(microstate_palette) <- microstate_levels

channel_group_palette <- c(
  Frontal = "#9C3F2E",
  Temporal = "#D49A51",
  Central = "#2E6F85",
  Parietal = "#4F7A45",
  Occipital = "#6C5A3E",
  Other = "#6B7280"
)

bg_fill <- "#FBF7F1"
panel_fill <- "#FFFDF8"
grid_color <- "#E4DCCF"
ink_color <- "#1F2A33"
muted_color <- "#5B6670"
warm_low <- "#F4EADC"
warm_mid <- "#D49A51"
warm_high <- "#7B2D26"
cool_low <- "#2166AC"
hot_high <- "#B2182B"

overview_theme <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
      strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color, lineheight = 1.05),
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      axis.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = grid_color, linewidth = 0.34),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10),
      panel.spacing = grid::unit(0.9, "lines"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
      legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
      plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(1.2), color = ink_color)
    )
}

save_svg <- function(plot_obj, output_path, width = 8, height = 5) {
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    output_path,
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    device = svglite::svglite,
    bg = bg_fill
  )
  output_path
}

head_outline <- tibble(
  angle = seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = 361),
  x = cos(angle),
  y = sin(angle)
)
nose_outline <- tibble(x = c(-0.09, 0, 0.09), y = c(0.98, 1.13, 0.98))
left_ear <- tibble(
  angle = seq(pi / 2, 3 * pi / 2, length.out = 80),
  x = -1.02 + 0.08 * cos(angle),
  y = 0.00 + 0.20 * sin(angle)
)
right_ear <- tibble(
  angle = seq(-pi / 2, pi / 2, length.out = 80),
  x = 1.02 + 0.08 * cos(angle),
  y = 0.00 + 0.20 * sin(angle)
)

scale_limit <- max(abs(topomap_grid$value), na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(scale_limit) || scale_limit <= 0) {
  scale_limit <- 1
}

topography_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(
    data = filter(topomap_grid, inside_head),
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = value),
    interpolate = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_contour(
    data = filter(topomap_grid, inside_head),
    aes(x = x, y = y, z = value),
    bins = 7,
    color = scales::alpha(ink_color, 0.30),
    linewidth = 0.18
  ) +
  geom_path(data = head_outline, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_path(data = nose_outline, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_path(data = left_ear, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_path(data = right_ear, aes(x = x, y = y), color = ink_color, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_point(
    data = template_values,
    aes(x = x, y = y),
    size = 1.35,
    color = ink_color,
    fill = panel_fill,
    shape = 21,
    stroke = 0.35
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~microstate_label, nrow = 1) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(-1.16, 1.16), ylim = c(-1.16, 1.16), clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = cool_low,
    mid = "#F7F3EA",
    high = hot_high,
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-scale_limit, scale_limit),
    oob = scales::squish,
    name = "Template\nloading"
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void(base_size = 10.6) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = panel_fill, color = NA),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#EFE6D8", color = NA),
    strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = ink_color),
    legend.text = element_text(color = ink_color),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 14, 10, 10),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = ink_color)
  )

parameter_metrics <- c("coverage_pct", "mean_duration_ms", "occurrence_per_sec", "gev_pct")
parameter_distribution_df <- parameter_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% parameter_metrics) %>%
  mutate(metric_label = droplevels(metric_label))

parameter_distribution_plot <- ggplot(
  parameter_distribution_df,
  aes(x = microstate_label, y = value, fill = microstate_label, color = microstate_label)
) +
  geom_violin(width = 0.72, alpha = 0.28, linewidth = 0.22, scale = "width", trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.16, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.74, linewidth = 0.28, color = ink_color) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.075, height = 0, seed = 97411),
    size = 1.35,
    alpha = 0.74,
    stroke = 0
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = mean,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 23,
    size = 2.5,
    fill = panel_fill,
    color = ink_color,
    stroke = 0.42
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", nrow = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = microstate_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = microstate_palette, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "EEG microstate",
    y = "Parameter value"
  ) +
  overview_theme(base_size = 10.2) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

coverage_df <- subject_parameters %>%
  group_by(patient_alias) %>%
  mutate(
    coverage_total = sum(coverage_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    coverage_composition = coverage_pct / coverage_total * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

subject_order <- coverage_df %>%
  group_by(patient_alias) %>%
  summarise(
    dominant_microstate = microstate_label[which.max(coverage_composition)],
    dominant_value = max(coverage_composition, na.rm = TRUE),
    entropy = {
      p <- coverage_composition / 100
      -sum(p * log(p + 1e-12)) / log(length(p))
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(dominant_microstate, desc(dominant_value), entropy)

coverage_df <- coverage_df %>%
  mutate(patient_alias = factor(patient_alias, levels = rev(subject_order$patient_alias)))

coverage_composition_plot <- ggplot(
  coverage_df,
  aes(x = coverage_composition, y = patient_alias, fill = microstate_label)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.78, color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.22) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = microstate_palette, name = "EEG microstate") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(x, "%"), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.01))) +
  labs(
    x = "Within-participant EEG time share",
    y = "Anonymized participant"
  ) +
  overview_theme(base_size = 10.2) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

transition_plot <- ggplot(
  transition_matrix,
  aes(x = to_label, y = from_label, fill = transition_pct)
) +
  geom_tile(color = panel_fill, linewidth = 0.55) +
  geom_text(aes(label = transition_label), color = ink_color, size = 3.25, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c(warm_low, warm_mid, warm_high),
    name = "Transition\nprobability"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Target EEG microstate",
    y = "Source EEG microstate"
  ) +
  overview_theme(base_size = 10.2) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 28, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

gfp_trace_plot <- ggplot(waveform_gfp, aes(x = relative_time_ms, y = gfp_uv)) +
  geom_area(fill = scales::alpha(hot_high, 0.18), color = NA) +
  geom_line(color = hot_high, linewidth = 0.48) +
  geom_point(
    data = waveform_peaks,
    aes(x = relative_time_ms, y = gfp_uv),
    shape = 21,
    size = 1.65,
    stroke = 0.35,
    color = ink_color,
    fill = hot_high
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "EEG GFP (uV)"
  ) +
  overview_theme(base_size = 9.7) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(8, 12, 0, 10)
  )

waveform_trace_plot <- ggplot(waveform_segment, aes(x = relative_time_ms)) +
  geom_vline(
    data = waveform_peaks,
    aes(xintercept = relative_time_ms),
    color = scales::alpha(hot_high, 0.18),
    linewidth = 0.32
  ) +
  geom_hline(
    data = waveform_channels,
    aes(yintercept = channel_y),
    color = scales::alpha(grid_color, 0.72),
    linewidth = 0.22
  ) +
  geom_line(
    aes(y = display_y, group = channel, color = channel_group),
    linewidth = 0.38,
    alpha = 0.94
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = channel_group_palette, name = "Channel group", drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = waveform_channels$channel_y,
    labels = waveform_channels$channel,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.015, 0.035))
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Time within EEG segment (ms)",
    y = "19 EEG channels"
  ) +
  overview_theme(base_size = 9.7) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7.6, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(0, 12, 8, 10)
  )

waveform_gfp_plot <- gfp_trace_plot / waveform_trace_plot +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(0.55, 2.15), guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

main_panel_plot <- topography_plot /
  (parameter_distribution_plot | coverage_composition_plot) /
  transition_plot /
  waveform_gfp_plot +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(0.76, 1.08, 0.76, 1.18), widths = c(1.15, 1)) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = bg_fill, color = NA),
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, color = ink_color)
  )

topography_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_topography_panel.svg"))
parameter_distribution_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_parameter_distributions.svg"))
coverage_composition_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_coverage_composition.svg"))
transition_plot_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_transition_matrix.svg"))
waveform_gfp_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_waveform_gfp_segment.svg"))
main_panel_path <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(output_stem, "_main_panel.svg"))

save_svg(topography_plot, topography_path, width = 12.8, height = 4.1)
save_svg(parameter_distribution_plot, parameter_distribution_path, width = 9.2, height = 6.2)
save_svg(coverage_composition_plot, coverage_composition_path, width = 8.2, height = 6.2)
save_svg(transition_plot, transition_plot_path, width = 7.4, height = 5.8)
save_svg(waveform_gfp_plot, waveform_gfp_path, width = 15.8, height = 7.4)
save_svg(main_panel_plot, main_panel_path, width = 16.8, height = 20.2)
```

## Inputs

```{r input-summary}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    item = c(
      "input_dir",
      "runtime_hash",
      "python_topographies",
      "subject_parameters",
      "group_parameters",
      "transition_matrix",
      "waveform_segment",
      "waveform_gfp",
      "output_dir"
    ),
    value = c(
      input_dir,
      runtime_hash,
      required_paths$python_topographies,
      required_paths$subject_parameters,
      required_paths$group_parameters,
      required_paths$transition_matrix,
      required_paths$waveform_segment,
      required_paths$waveform_gfp,
      output_dir
    )
  ),
  col.names = c("Item", "Value")
)
```

## Group Parameters

```{r group-parameters}
knitr::kable(
  group_parameters %>%
    select(microstate_label, metric_label, mean, std, median, min, max) %>%
    mutate(across(c(mean, std, median, min, max), ~round(.x, 3)))
)
```

## Main Panel

```{r main-panel, fig.width=16.8, fig.height=20.2}
main_panel_plot
```

## Topography Panel

```{r topography-panel, fig.width=12.8, fig.height=4.1}
topography_plot
```

## Parameter Distributions

```{r parameter-distributions, fig.width=9.2, fig.height=6.2}
parameter_distribution_plot
```

## Coverage Composition

```{r coverage-composition, fig.width=8.2, fig.height=6.2}
coverage_composition_plot
```

## Transition Matrix

```{r transition-matrix, fig.width=7.4, fig.height=5.8}
transition_plot
```

## EEG Waveform and GFP Peaks

```{r waveform-gfp, fig.width=15.8, fig.height=7.4}
waveform_gfp_plot
```

## Outputs

```{r outputs-table}
output_manifest <- data.frame(
  artifact = c(
    basename(topography_path),
    basename(parameter_distribution_path),
    basename(coverage_composition_path),
    basename(transition_plot_path),
    basename(waveform_gfp_path),
    basename(main_panel_path)
  ),
  path = c(
    topography_path,
    parameter_distribution_path,
    coverage_composition_path,
    transition_plot_path,
    waveform_gfp_path,
    main_panel_path
  )
)
knitr::kable(output_manifest)
```
